installCommand: curl -L https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.44.0-stable.tar.xz -o flutter.tar.xz && tar -xf flutter.tar.xz && git config --global --add safe.directory /vercel/path0/flutter && ./flutter/bin/flutter config --enable-web && ./flutter/bin/flutter pub get
